title: 10th Pass Jobs 2026 – Driver, Steno and More
shortInfo: Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Various. Candidates Bachelor's Degree, 12th, 10th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Deendayal Research Institute official website.

basic_details.job_title: Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Driver, Steno and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Various. Candidates Bachelor's Degree, 12th, 10th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Deendayal Research Institute official website.

application_fee.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is 30 years. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the Deendayal Research Institute Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree, Computer Science Degree, 12th Pass, Matriculation Pass
qualification.details: Assistant: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University. Desirable: Minimum 2 years working experience in Tally Accounting from a recognized institution. Program Assistant (Computer)/T4: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or any other branch of Computer Science or equivalent qualification from a recognized University. Desirable: Minimum 2 years working experience in computer application of IT management in a recognized Institution, Having knowledge of networking and software. Stenographer grade III: 12th passed or equivalent from a recognized board or university. Desirable: Minimum 2 years working experience in a recognized institution. Driver/T1: Matriculation pass from a recognized Board/authorized institution. Possession of a valid and appropriate driving license from a prescribed Government Authority. Desirable: One year trade certificate in the relevant field from ITI, Minimum 2 years working experience of driving in a recognized institution or experience of motor mechanic work.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.gonda.kvk4.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Deendayal Research Institute Various Posts is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in the Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various posts including Assistant, Program Assistant, Stenographer, and Driver.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Driver post is Matriculation pass from a recognized Board/authorized institution, along with a valid driving license.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the posts advertised by Deendayal Research Institute?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 30 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1000.

faq.question: What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST category candidates is Rs. 750.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written examination for screening, followed by an interview.

faq.question: How can I apply for the Deendayal Research Institute Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates can download the application form from the official website and send it along with necessary documents to the specified address.

faq.question: What is the official website for Deendayal Research Institute Gonda?
faq.answer: The official website for Deendayal Research Institute Gonda is www.gonda.kvk4.in.

faq.question: What is the salary scale for the Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary scale for the Assistant post is Level-6, ranging from Rs 35,400 to Rs 1,12,400.
